name: Radar Park
description: Come play pickleball at Radar Park in Weatherford, OK! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Rader Park
description: Rader Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Weatherford, OK. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Terrier Pickleball
description: Terrier Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Thomas, OK. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
